ocr_findings.description: OCR inserted spurious phonetic stub text 'シート・マー' before 'CEO' and 'シート・リー' before 'CIO' in the table. These appear to be garbled OCR of small ruby/furigana text above the acronyms in the image. The image shows small superscript readings for CEO/CIO that were misread as inline katakana strings, corrupting the table cell content.

The '学習のポイント' callout box with mascot illustration at the bottom of the page is replaced by an image placeholder, losing the 'コラム' label and decorative frame — though the '集中学習よりも、分散学習' section text is fully captured.

reviewer_notes: Lesson 01-04 on management role titles (CEO, CIO). The main table has a med-severity artifact: garbled katakana strings 'シート・マー' and 'シート・リー' appear in the CEO and CIO rows respectively, likely from misread ruby/furigana annotations. The bullet-point '試験にはコシが出る！' summary and the 分散学習 column text are accurately captured. The table cell descriptions for CEO and CIO are otherwise correct.
